RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT BOSLEY MEDICAL INSTITUTE AND TERRENCE ARAGONI, M.D. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: GRANTED. Prevailing party is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (301/JLW/CA-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-05-2004 Continued To Oct-18-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Duane C. Musfelt, Esq., Lewis, Brisbois, Bisgaard & Smith, (415) 362-2580, for Defendant and Moving Party Bosley Medical Institute and Terrence Aragoni, M.D.
Roger Hahn, Esq., (530) 662-1082, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party
Zolaikha Bayar
RULING:
A R G U E D; Counsel stipulated to continue this hearing in light of Plaintiff's counsel may file a 473(b) motion for not filing opposition papers with the court. The court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BOSLEY MEDICAL INSTITUTE AND TERRENCE ARAGONI, M.D.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: CONTINUED TO 10/18/04 per stipulation of counel. (301/JLW/ac) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
